description_long: This sconce features a robust, metallic construction with three cylindrical lamp housings arranged in a triangular formation atop a sturdy, angular base. The finish is a dark, burnished bronze or brass, giving it a weathered, industrial appearance. The lamp housings are vertically oriented and capped, suggesting a design that conceals the bulbs within. The base includes two rectangular mounting plates, each with geometric cutouts, likely for securing the fixture to a wall and for cable management. The overall design is symmetrical, with the central lamp slightly taller than the two flanking lamps. The fixture exudes a utilitarian yet decorative style, suitable for urban exteriors or industrial-themed interiors.
description: A dark, metallic sconce with three cylindrical lamp housings on a geometric base, featuring a weathered, industrial look. The fixture is symmetrical and robust, with decorative cutouts on the mounting plates.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three cylindrical lamp housings and the symmetrical, angular base with visible mounting plates.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the central lamp housing and the geometric cutouts in the mounting plates.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the mounting plates and the alignment of the three lamp housings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the side profile of the lamp housings and the mounting plate cutouts.
attribute_fixture_design: Industrial with geometric and utilitarian motifs, featuring a weathered metallic finish and angular mounting plates with cutouts.
